summary: Iteration 74 - Comprehensive testing of 4 user-reported bug fixes and seed data. All 10 test scenarios passed. (1) Mentor column derivation from member_type.is_mentor verified - Corporate type members show is_mentor=False, Mentors type members show is_mentor=True. (2) Bundle detail back link uses CMS-renamed label 'Session Bundles - Offerts'. (3) Event detail back link AND breadcrumb both use CMS-renamed label 'AUX Calendar ewew'. (4) 14 members total with correct seed data. (5) 6 CMS roles exist including 4 custom roles. (6) 4 member levels with correct order. (7) CMS Manager scope correct - has Members/Settings, no Roles/Backup. (8) Mentor Coordinator scope correct - has Calendar group only. (9) Documentation page shows 5 cards including Testing Manual. (10) Regression: /my-account/login loads correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Mentor column derivation correctly implemented in /api/admin/members - derives is_mentor from member_type lookup, not stored field
BundleDetail.js correctly uses sectionLabel('bundles', 'Session Bundles') for back link
EventDetail.js correctly uses sectionLabel('global-calendar', `${auxPrefix} Calendar`) for back link
MyAccountLayout.js breadcrumb correctly honours navOrderState rename for event-detail routes
DocumentationManager.js has 5 cards including Testing Manual with data-testid='doc-link-testing-manual'
CMS role-based sidebar filtering working correctly for CMS Manager and Mentor Coordinator
seed_data_creation: Seed already run - 14 members total (admin + AUX-1/2/3 + 10 sample members AUX-101 to AUX-110)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 74 verified all 4 user-reported bug fixes: (1) Mentor column now derived from member_type.is_mentor, (2) Bundle detail back link uses CMS label, (3) Event detail back link + breadcrumb use CMS label, (4) Seed data correct with 14 members, 6 roles, 4 levels. CMS labels currently set: 'Session Bundles - Offerts' for bundles, 'AUX Calendar ewew' for global-calendar. All CMS Manager and Mentor Coordinator scope tests passed.
